lines.speaker: Aoi
lines.text: Start with the problem, not the code.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: I'll keep this brief — three parts: problem, solution, results.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: The main problem we're solving is failed checkouts at peak traffic.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: We added caching and a retry queue.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: To summarize — 40% faster and 99.9% success rate.

lines.speaker: Kenji
lines.text: Clear structure — ready for stakeholders.

presentation-pitch/96.title: Let Me Walk You Through the Demo

lines.speaker: PM
lines.text: Show us the new checkout flow.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: Let me walk you through the happy path first.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: As you can see on this slide, latency dropped after caching.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: I'll run through a test purchase now.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: Checkout completes — team claps

lines.speaker: PM
lines.text: Clean demo — very easy to follow.

lines.speaker: Investor
lines.text: What's the one thing we should remember?

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: The key takeaway is reliability under traffic spikes.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: Here's what changed since last time — we cut errors by half.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: Let me break down the numbers on this chart.

lines.speaker: Investor
lines.text: Clear takeaway — I get the business impact.

lines.speaker: Kenji
lines.text: Strong close — always land the takeaway.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: Any questions on this part before we wrap up?

lines.speaker: Investor
lines.text: What if traffic grows 10x next month?

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: That's a great question — let me show our scaling plan.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: We can handle 3x today; for 10x we need the queue migration.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: I'll circle back with a detailed capacity doc by Friday.

lines.speaker: Investor
lines.text: Honest answer — I appreciate the transparency.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: Team high-five after investor meeting

lines.speaker: Kenji
lines.text: Your Let me walk you through flow was smooth.

lines.speaker: PM
lines.text: The key takeaway is line landed perfectly.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: I handled tough questions without panicking.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: I look forward to the product launch demo next month.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: Presentation English — unlocked.

lines.speaker: PagerDuty
lines.text: Checkout error rate > 15%

lines.speaker: Kenji
lines.text: Let's focus on the facts, not blame — status first.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: What we know so far is API timeouts on payment service.

lines.speaker: Aoi
lines.text: I'll dig into the database metrics.

lines.speaker: Linh
lines.text: Last deploy was 2 hours ago — possible correlation.

lines.speaker: Kenji
lines.text: Good — keep updates every 15 minutes.

incident-postmortem/101.title: What We Know So Far Is...

lines.speaker: PM
lines.text: What's the customer impact?

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: What we know so far is 12% of checkouts are failing.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: The impact was that EU users couldn't complete purchases.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: The timeline of events was: deploy at 8pm, errors at 8:45pm.

lines.speaker: Kenji
lines.text: We rolled back at 9:10pm — errors dropping now.

lines.speaker: PM
lines.text: Clear update — thanks for the timeline.

lines.speaker: Aoi
lines.text: Logs show cache invalidation errors.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: Root cause appears to be stale cache keys after deploy.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: It seems like the new TTL config wasn't applied.

lines.speaker: Linh
lines.text: This might be caused by a missing env variable in staging.

lines.speaker: Kenji
lines.text: Let's verify before we finalize the postmortem.

lines.speaker: Kenji
lines.text: Process gap, not person fault.

lines.speaker: Title
lines.text: Checkout Incident — Action Items

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: We mitigated the issue by rolling back within 25 minutes.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: To prevent this from happening again, we'll add a cache integration test.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: Action items going forward: update runbook, fix env check, schedule game day.

lines.speaker: Aoi
lines.text: I'll own the runbook update by Friday.

lines.speaker: Kenji
lines.text: Clear actions — no blame, just improvement.

lines.speaker: Leadership
lines.text: Walk us through the incident briefly.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: What we know so far is covered in the doc — 12% impact, 25-min recovery.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: Root cause appears to be cache config — fixed and tested.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: Action items going forward are assigned with owners and dates.

lines.speaker: Kenji
lines.text: I'll follow up on the game day drill next sprint.

lines.speaker: Leadership
lines.text: Blameless, clear, actionable — well done.

lines.speaker: PM
lines.text: Welcome! I'll get you looped in on the launch channel.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: Sorry — I keep getting pinged on every thread.

lines.speaker: Buddy
lines.text: Don't worry. We'll get you up to speed by standup tomorrow.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: There are twelve stakeholders I wasn't looped in on yet.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: I'm getting up to speed — but I still get pinged after hours.

lines.speaker: Hook
lines.text: Next: We Need Buy-In

lines.speaker: PM
lines.text: We can't ship without buy-in from design and legal.

lines.speaker: Designer
lines.text: We're not aligned on the user flow yet.

lines.speaker: Kenji
lines.text: Let's get aligned on one MVP before we debate polish.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: If we get buy-in on this scope, we can get the ball rolling Monday.

lines.speaker: Legal
lines.text: I'm in.

lines.speaker: Hook
lines.text: Next: Blocked on Dependencies

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: I'm blocked on the payments API — third day.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: Every time I ask, I get blocked on a different dependency.

lines.speaker: Kenji
lines.text: Nam needs to get unblocked today — demo is Friday.

lines.speaker: Platform
lines.text: You should be unblocked now — try the staging key.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: Once I'm unblocked, I can get through code review tonight.

lines.speaker: Hook
lines.text: Next: Ship It Friday

lines.speaker: PM
lines.text: We need sign-off from QA and product before we get shipped.

lines.speaker: Linh
lines.text: Staging looks good — I'll get sign-off from QA in ten minutes.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: Are we ready? I want everything to get ready before we merge.

lines.speaker: Kenji
lines.text: Feature got shipped — nice work.

lines.speaker: Hook
lines.text: Next: Pulled Into the War Room

lines.speaker: On-call
lines.text: Sorry — you're getting pulled into the checkout war room.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: I'm stuck — the error only happens in prod, not staging.

lines.speaker: Kenji
lines.text: Don't spin — tell PM you'll get back to them in thirty minutes.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: I'll get back to the team once rollback is confirmed.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: Got pulled into my first war room — and we got through it.

lines.speaker: Hook
lines.text: Next: The Acquisition News

lines.speaker: CEO
lines.text: Big news — we're getting acquired by a global platform.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: Does this mean layoffs… or opportunities?

lines.speaker: VP
lines.text: I wanted face time with you before the reorg.

lines.speaker: VP
lines.text: You're getting promoted to senior — they noticed your ship work.

lines.speaker: Kenji
lines.text: When a startup gets acquired, culture changes — stay flexible.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: I got face time, got promoted… and the whole company got acquired.

lines.speaker: Friend
lines.text: Welcome! Let's get to the hotel before rush hour.

lines.speaker: Clerk
lines.text: I'll get you checked in — passport and booking, please.

lines.speaker: Friend
lines.text: Walk with me — you'll get your bearings in the old town.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: It took an hour to get to Zurich, but I already love it.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: Once I get my bearings, I want to explore every alley.

lines.speaker: Hook
lines.text: Next: The Glacier Express

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: How do I get a ticket for the Glacier Express?

lines.speaker: Friend
lines.text: First class or second? Get a ticket with a seat reservation.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: Wait — do we get on at platform 7 or 8?

lines.speaker: Friend
lines.text: We get off at Filisur — don't miss the stop.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: I nearly forgot to get off — the view hypnotized me.

lines.speaker: Hook
lines.text: Next: View from the Top

lines.speaker: Friend
lines.text: From here you'll get a view of the whole Bernese Alps.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: I think I'm getting altitude sickness — head is spinning.

lines.speaker: Friend
lines.text: Sit still. Altitude sickness passes if you rest.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: Can I get change for this twenty-franc note?

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: Worth it — I got a view of mountains I'll never forget.

lines.speaker: Hook
lines.text: Next: Snowed In at Zermatt

lines.speaker: Hotel host
lines.text: You might get snowed in tonight — roads are closing.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: We got held up by the avalanche warning.

lines.speaker: Friend
lines.text: We can get by with phrasebook German and gestures.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: English gets you by here — everyone is kind.

lines.speaker: Friend
lines.text: Sometimes getting held up is how you meet the best stories.

lines.speaker: Hook
lines.text: Next: Lost on the Alpine Trail

lines.speaker: Friend
lines.text: Stay close — it's easy to get lost up here.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: I think we're lost — which way back to Zermatt?

lines.speaker: Friend
lines.text: Listen — we got swept up in a local festival by accident.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: Best wrong turn ever — I got swept up in the music.

lines.speaker: Local
lines.text: I can get you a ride back — jump in the back.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: Switzerland taught me how to get around — even when lost.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: I need to get ready — deep breath.

lines.speaker: Facilitator
lines.text: It takes time to get used to speaking English out loud.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: Sorry — I'm not used to talking this long in English.

lines.speaker: Partner
lines.text: You got through the hardest part — the first five minutes.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: I got through my first meetup without switching to Vietnamese.

lines.speaker: Hook
lines.text: Next: When You Finally Get It

lines.speaker: Tutor
lines.text: Don't memorize lists — use them until you get it.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: Oh — I get it now. Get blocked means dependency stopped me.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: Let me get back to you after this lesson — I'm studying.

lines.speaker: Barista
lines.text: Your English is good — you get by fine here.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: I used to get by with one-word answers. Not anymore.

lines.speaker: Hook
lines.text: Next: Everyday Get Finale

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: I'll get you onboarded — same as my SF rotation.

lines.speaker: HR
lines.text: We need your sign-off as his onboarding buddy.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: Get looped in, get unblocked, get shipped — you'll hear these daily.

lines.speaker: Riku
lines.text: Can I get a ride to the station with you?

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: I got onboarded once too. Now I help others get it.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: Everyday English isn't perfect — but you get by, get better, and get heard.
